name: Shrimp in Creamy Coriander Sauce
recipeIngredient: 2 large ripe tomatoes, peeled, seeded, and sliced
1 cup fish stock or clam juice
Salt and freshly ground black pepper to taste
recipeInstructions:
1. In a large skillet over low heat, melt the butter. When it begins to foam, add the garlic, tomatoes, coriander, sherry, and shrimp, and cook, stirring for 4 to 5 minutes.
2. To prepare the sauce, in a saucepan over low heat, melt the butter. When it begins to foam, add the flour and cook, stirring until well blended but not brown for 2 minutes. Raise the heat to medium, whisk in the stock and milk, and continue cooking, whisking, until the mixture comes to a boil. Add salt, pepper, Tabasco sauce (if using), and Worcestershire sauce.
3. Add the sauce to the shrimp, stir to blend, and cook over low heat for 3 to 4 minutes. Remove to a heated serving platter and serve hot with white rice. Makes 6 to 8 servings
